prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年东华大学在重庆物理类最低录取位次分别为约10966→12251→12990→14043→13949名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约2983名；2025年基准位次 约13949名，较2024年微升94名，出现企稳迹象；东华大学在重庆物理类招生计划2021年32人、2022年33人、2023年35人、2024年34人、2025年39人；2026年（§ 7）计划增至45人，较2025年扩招约15.4%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东华大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第81位持续 上升至2026年第72位，排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和品牌认可度增强；东华大学在抖音热度排名第96位，评价为"一般"，综合热度较低；声誉文件中未见明显 负面舆情或投档异常记录；常被称为"被校名耽误的211大学"，社会认知度与实力存在一定落差；第五轮学科评估中，材料科学与工程获评A级，为该校最强学科；纺织科学与工程为传统王牌（第四轮A+），与招生专业中的材料类、纺织工程、功能材料等高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域:
计算机类、电子信息类为高热推荐专业，电气工 程及其自动化高热推荐，而材料类、化学类属明显劝退方向；重庆2026年物理类考生约129580人（按近年62%比例估算），较2025年139478人减少约7%，竞争略有缓解；省控线202 5年425分，近年波动不大；东华大学位于上海，对重庆考生属跨省报考；2025年在重庆招生占比约2.5%，属正常水平；上海地域优势对考生有一定吸引力。
8. 【预测结论】综合2025年位次企稳、2026年大幅扩招约15.4%使竞争加剧（位次后移）、学校排名持续上升增强吸引力、重庆物理类考生减少约7%缓解竞争、计算机/电子信息等热 门专业吸引高分考生等多重因素，考虑到学校排名上升和考生减少的正面影响，适当收窄后移幅度。预测2026年最低录取位次约15036名，区间 14536–15536名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Donghua University in Chongqing Physics Category were approximately 10966 → 12251 → 12990 → 14043 → 13949, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2983 positions in the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 13949, a slight increase of 94 positions compared to 2024, indicating signs of stabilization; the enrollment plan for Donghua University in Chongqing Physics Category was 32 in 2021, 33 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 34 in 2024, and 39 in 2025; in 2026 (§ 7), the plan increases to 45, an expansion of about 15.4% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Donghua University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has steadily risen from 81st in 2021 to 72nd in 2026, indicating continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and brand recognition; Donghua University ranks 96th in Douyin popularity, rated as 'average', with relatively low overall popularity; no significant negative public opinion or abnormal filing records are found in the reputation documents; it is often called 'a 211 university hindered by its name', with a gap between social recognition and actual strength; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Materials Science and Engineering was rated A-level, making it the strongest discipline; Textile Science and Engineering is the traditional trump card (A+ in the fourth round), highly related to the enrollment majors such as Materials, Textile Engineering, and Functional Materials.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Computer, Electronic Information are highly recommended hot majors, Electrical Engineering and its Automation is also highly recommended, while Materials, Chemistry are clearly discouraged directions; the number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing in 2026 is approximately 129,580 (estimated based on about 62% of recent years), a decrease of about 7% compared to 139,478 in 2025, slightly easing competition; the provincial control line in 2025 is 425 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; Donghua University is located in Shanghai, which is a cross-province application for Chongqing candidates; the enrollment proportion in Chongqing in 2025 is about 2.5%, which is normal; the regional advantage of Shanghai has a certain appeal to candidates.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Considering multiple factors such as the stabilization of rankings in 2025, the significant expansion of about 15.4% in 2026 intensifying competition (backward shift in rankings), the continuous rise in university rankings enhancing attractiveness, the decrease of about 7% in Chongqing Physics Category candidates easing competition, and hot majors like Computer and Electronic Information attracting high-scoring candidates, and taking into account the positive effects of rising rankings and decreasing candidates, the backward shift is appropriately narrowed. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 15036, with a range of 14536–15536.

- Electronic Information

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 14536–15536, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, Tier 1 majors can be used as sprint targets (requiring rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range), and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. Computer and Electronic Information are currently hot majors in society, with fierce competition but good employment prospects; although Materials is rated A-level in discipline evaluation, its social popularity is low, offering high cost performance. It is recommended to combine personal interests and career plans for a reasonable mix.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Donghua University in Chongqing's History Category were approximately 2188 → 2306 → 2226 → 3032 → 2031, showing significant fluctuations; after a sharp drop to 3032 in 2024, it rebounded strongly to 2031 in 2025, the best ranking in the past five years; Donghua University's enrollment plan in Chongqing's History Category was 9 students in 2021, 8 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 5 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 4 students, a 20% reduction compared to 2025, which is a significant reduction and helps alleviate competition (ranking moves forward).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Donghua University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science ranking has continuously risen to 72nd in 2026, enhancing brand recognition; Donghua University has no negative records in reputation documents, and its Douyin popularity is average; the History Category enrollment majors are mainly economics, management, and languages, with moderate social attention; Materials Science and Engineering (A-level) is the strongest discipline, but has low correlation with History Category enrollment majors (Economics and Management Pilot Class, English, Japanese, Economics and Trade); economics and management related disciplines have not been individually rated.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Social popularity for economics and management is divided and wait-and-see, while foreign languages are generally wait-and-see; Chongqing's 2026 History Category candidates are approximately 79,420 (estimated at about 38% of recent years), an increase of about 8.2% from 73,373 in 2025, intensifying competition; the provincial control line has fluctuated from 456 in 2021 to 438 in 2025, showing an overall upward trend.
7. [Regional Factor] Donghua University is located in Shanghai, which has regional appeal for History Category candidates; its overall enrollment proportion in Chongqing in 2025 is about 2.5%.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the significant rebound of the 2025 ranking to 2031 (best in five years), the 20% enrollment reduction in 2026 easing competition (ranking moves forward), the approximately 8.2% increase in Chongqing History Category candidates intensifying competition, and the rising provincial control line reflecting overall intensified competition, and taking into account the negative impacts of increased candidates and rising control line, the forward movement is appropriately adjusted. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 1837, with a range of 1506–2168.

- Economics and Trade Category.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With rankings within the predicted range of 1506–2168, and few History Category enrollment majors (only 4), it is recommended to focus on Economics and Management Pilot Class and Economics and Trade Category as primary application directions, English as a medium choice, and Japanese as a safety option. When rankings are significantly better than the lower bound of the range, prioritize aiming for the Economics and Management Pilot Class.
